## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the domain domain.

## Available Resources

    24→func (hs *HTTPServer) handleQueryMetricsError(err error) *response.NormalResponse {
    25→	if errors.Is(err, datasources.ErrDataSourceAccessDenied) {
    26→		return response.Error(http.StatusForbidden, "Access denied to data source", err)
    27→	}
    28→	if errors.Is(err, datasources.ErrDataSourceNotFound) {
    29→		return response.Error(http.StatusNotFound, "Data source not found", err)
    30→	}
    31→
    32→	return response.ErrOrFallback(http.StatusInternalServerError, "Query data error", err)
    33→}

    35→// metrics.go
    36→func (hs *HTTPServer) getDSQueryEndpoint() web.Handler {
    37→	if hs.Features.IsEnabledGlobally(featuremgmt.FlagQueryServiceRewrite) {
    38→		// rewrite requests from /ds/query to the new query service
    39→		namespaceMapper := request.GetNamespaceMapper(hs.Cfg)
    40→		return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    41→			user, err := identity.GetRequester(r.Context())
    42→			if err != nil || user == nil {
    43→				errhttp.Write(r.Context(), fmt.Errorf("no user"), w)
    44→				return

    21→	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/setting"
    22→)
    23→
    24→// DatasourceType is the string constant used as the datasource when the property is in Datasource.Type.
    25→// Type in requests is used to identify what type of data source plugin the request belongs to.
    26→const DatasourceType = "__expr__"
    27→
    28→// DatasourceUID is the string constant used as the datasource name in requests
    29→// to identify it as an expression command when use in Datasource.UID.
    30→const DatasourceUID = DatasourceType
    31→
    32→// DatasourceID is the fake datasource id used in requests to identify it as an
    33→// expression command.
    34→const DatasourceID = -100
    35→
    36→// OldDatasourceUID is the datasource uid used in requests to identify it as an
    37→// expression command. It goes with the query root level datasourceUID property. It was accidentally
    38→// set to the Id and is now kept for backwards compatibility. The newer Datasource.UID property
    39→// should be used instead and should be set to "__expr__".
    40→const OldDatasourceUID = "-100"
    41→
    42→// IsDataSource checks if the uid points to an expression query
    43→func IsDataSource(uid string) bool {
    44→	return uid == DatasourceUID || uid == OldDatasourceUID
    45→}
    46→
    47→// NodeTypeFromDatasourceUID returns NodeType depending on the UID of the data source: TypeCMDNode if UID is DatasourceUID
    48→// or OldDatasourceUID, and TypeDatasourceNode otherwise.
    49→func NodeTypeFromDatasourceUID(uid string) NodeType {
    50→	if IsDataSource(uid) {
    51→		return TypeCMDNode
    52→	}
    53→	if uid == MLDatasourceUID {
    54→		return TypeMLNode
    55→	}
    56→	return TypeDatasourceNode
    57→}
    58→
    59→// Service is service representation for expression handling.
    60→type Service struct {
    61→	cfg          *setting.Cfg
    62→	dataService  backend.QueryDataHandler
    63→	pCtxProvider pluginContextProvider
    64→	features     featuremgmt.FeatureToggles
    65→	converter    *ResultConverter
    66→
    67→	pluginsClient backend.CallResourceHandler
    68→
    69→	tracer                    tracing.Tracer
    70→	metrics                   *metrics.ExprMetrics
    71→	qsDatasourceClientBuilder dsquerierclient.QSDatasourceClientBuilder
    72→}
    73→
    74→type pluginContextProvider interface {
    75→	Get(ctx context.Context, pluginID string, user identity.Requester, orgID int64) (backend.PluginContext, error)
    76→	GetWithDataSource(ctx context.Context, pluginID string, user identity.Requester, ds *datasources.DataSource) (backend.PluginContext, error)
    77→}
    78→
    79→func ProvideService(cfg *setting.Cfg, pluginClient plugins.Client, pCtxProvider *plugincontext.Provider,
    80→	features featuremgmt.FeatureToggles, registerer prometheus.Registerer, tracer tracing.Tracer, builder dsquerierclient.QSDatasourceClientBuilder) *Service {
    81→	return &Service{
    82→		cfg:           cfg,
    83→		dataService:   pluginClient,
    84→		pCtxProvider:  pCtxProvider,
    85→		features:      features,
    86→		tracer:        tracer,
    87→		metrics:       metrics.NewSSEMetrics(registerer),
    88→		pluginsClient: pluginClient,
    89→		converter: &ResultConverter{
    90→			Features: features,
    91→			Tracer:   tracer,
    92→		},
    93→		qsDatasourceClientBuilder: builder,
    94→	}
    95→}
    96→
    97→func (s *Service) isDisabled() bool {
    98→	if s.cfg == nil {
    99→		return true
   100→	}

package query

import (
	"context"
	"encoding/json"

	"github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus"
	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"
	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema"
	"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authorization/authorizer"
	"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/registry/rest"
	genericapiserver "k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server"
	common "k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/common"
	"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/spec3"

	claims "github.com/grafana/authlib/types"
	query "github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/apis/query/v0alpha1"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/expr"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/expr/metrics"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/infra/log"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/infra/tracing"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/plugins"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/registry/apis/query/client"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/registry/apis/query/clientapi"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/registry/apis/query/queryschema"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/services/accesscontrol"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/services/apiserver/builder"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/services/datasources"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/services/datasources/service"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/services/featuremgmt"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/services/pluginsintegration/plugincontext"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/services/pluginsintegration/pluginstore"
	"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/setting"
)

var _ builder.APIGroupBuilder = (*QueryAPIBuilder)(nil)

type QueryAPIBuilder struct {
	log                  log.Logger
	concurrentQueryLimit int
	features             featuremgmt.FeatureToggles

	authorizer authorizer.Authorizer

	tracer                 tracing.Tracer
	metrics                *metrics.ExprMetrics
	instanceProvider       clientapi.InstanceProvider
	registry               query.DataSourceApiServerRegistry
	converter              *expr.ResultConverter
	queryTypes             *query.QueryTypeDefinitionList
	legacyDatasourceLookup service.LegacyDataSourceLookup
	connections            DataSourceConnectionProvider
}

func NewQueryAPIBuilder(
	features featuremgmt.FeatureToggles,
	instanceProvider clientapi.InstanceProvider,
	ar authorizer.Authorizer,
	registry query.DataSourceApiServerRegistry,
	registerer prometheus.Registerer,
	tracer tracing.Tracer,
	legacyDatasourceLookup service.LegacyDataSourceLookup,
	connections DataSourceConnectionProvider,
) (*QueryAPIBuilder, error) {
	// Include well typed query definitions
	var queryTypes *query.QueryTypeDefinitionList
	if features.IsEnabledGlobally(featuremgmt.FlagDatasourceQueryTypes) {
		// Read the expression query definitions
		raw, err := expr.QueryTypeDefinitionListJSON()
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		queryTypes = &query.QueryTypeDefinitionList{}
		err = json.Unmarshal(raw, queryTypes)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
	}

	return &QueryAPIBuilder{
		concurrentQueryLimit: 4,
		log:                  log.New("query_apiserver"),
		instanceProvider:     instanceProvider,
		authorizer:           ar,
		registry:             registry,
		metrics:              metrics.NewQueryServiceExpressionsMetrics(registerer),
		tracer:               tracer,
		features:             features,
		queryTypes:           queryTypes,
		connections:          connections,
		converter: &expr.ResultConverter{
			Features: features,
			Tracer:   tracer,
		},
		legacyDatasourceLookup: legacyDatasourceLookup,
	}, nil
}

			Tracer:   tracer,
		},
		legacyDatasourceLookup: legacyDatasourceLookup,
	}, nil
